name: synth_clean_dijkstra_0325
description: Write tests for Dijkstra shortest path

trajectory.task: Write tests for Dijkstra shortest path
cot_traces: I need to write comprehensive tests for Dijkstra shortest path.
I should cover: normal case, edge cases (negative weights (not supported), unreachable nodes), and error cases.
Each test should verify the actual output, not just that it runs.
